Flow.description: Test fixture autolaunched flow that creates an Account from the supplied name, used by Revenant integration tests to exercise a flow side effect and its fault path.

recordCreates.description: Creates an Account whose Name is the accountName input; routes any DML fault to Log_Fault.
recordCreates.name: Create_Account
recordCreates.label: Create Account

recordCreates.description: Fault handler: persists the flow fault message to a Workflow_Log__c error record, mirroring the Apex WorkflowLog.error sink, so the failure surfaces in the durable log.
recordCreates.name: Log_Fault
recordCreates.label: Log Fault

assignments.description: Terminal fault handler: captures the fault message into faultMessage if even the error log insert fails, so the flow ends cleanly (mirrors WorkflowLog.error swallowing its own insert failures).
assignments.name: Capture_Fault
assignments.label: Capture Fault

Flow.label: Test Side Effect Flow

variables.description: Name used for the Account created by this flow.
variables.name: accountName

variables.description: Captured fault message when a DML operation in this flow fails.
variables.name: faultMessage
